title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 23.298 - Rights and duties not affected by sunsetting of programs
text:
23.298.  Rights and duties not affected by sunsetting of programs. — Except as otherwise expressly provided, sunset of a program does not affect the rights and duties that matured, penalties incurred or imposed, civil or criminal liabilities that arose, or proceedings initiated before the effective date of the sunset.
(L. 2003 S.B. 299 & 40)
